message:
fix(fr-runtime): AUTH 2-arg form returns WRONGPASS for unknown user [bd-frankenredis-5qln]

Upstream Redis 7.2 server.c::authCommand only emits the
"AUTH <password> called without any password configured for the
default user" error from the 1-arg form. The 2-arg form
(AUTH <user> <pass>) goes through ACLGetUserByName +
ACLAuthenticateUser, which return WRONGPASS for unknown users
or wrong passwords regardless of whether requirepass is set.

fr-runtime::handle_auth_command was returning the NotConfigured
error for both arities because authenticate_user short-circuits
on !auth_required(). Translate NotConfigured to WRONGPASS in the
2-arg path and emit an ACL log event so the failure is visible
to ACL LOG.

Adds two regression tests pinning both branches:
  - auth_two_arg_unknown_user_returns_wrongpass_when_no_requirepass
  - auth_one_arg_keeps_not_configured_error_when_no_requirepass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
